name: recordapp
description: ScreenStudio — desktop screen recorder built with Electron + Next.js

scripts.build:exe: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron next build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.build:portable: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron next build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win portable --publish never
scripts.release: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron next build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --publish always
